repository_conventions.summary: waitForTimeout is forbidden. Use Playwright locator assertions which auto-wait.
Use getByRole and getByTestId for element selection

findings.title: waitForTimeout(1500) before search results assertion violates documented waiting convention

evidence.summary: waitForTimeout(1500) added before asserting search-results visibility — directly contradicts coding-standards.md

findings.why_it_matters: The documented standard explicitly forbids waitForTimeout. The following toBeVisible() assertion already auto-waits up to the configured timeout. The hard sleep adds latency on fast machines and causes flakiness on slow ones.
findings.suggested_fix: Remove `await page.waitForTimeout(1500);`. The assertion `await expect(page.getByTestId('search-results')).toBeVisible();` handles waiting automatically.

findings.title: waitForTimeout(1500) before no-results assertion violates documented waiting convention

evidence.summary: waitForTimeout(1500) added before asserting no-results-message visibility

findings.why_it_matters: Same issue as f-1. The no-results-message assertion already auto-waits.

top_risks: tests/search.spec.ts adds two waitForTimeout hard sleeps that directly violate the documented coding standard
